title: En Uyir Kadhale Lyrics Kettavan
stanzas:
En uyir kadhale
nee engae ponaaye
nee illaa vazhkai
valikkuthadi

en moochin swasathil
nee kalandhayadi
nee ippo kaatrodu
maraindhu vittaai.

en thavaraa
anbae un thavaraa
en kadhalin vedhanai
puriyalaiyaa

anbaeen thavaraa
anbae un thavaraa
en idhayathai therinju
yaen nogadithaai.

En uyir kadhale
nee engae ponaaye
nee illaa vazhkai
valikkuthadi

en moochin swasathil
nee kalandhayadi
nee ippo kaatrodu
maraindhu vittaai.

Adi kadhal pichchai podu
ennai nee vazha vai
oru murai sollu ne
en kadhali indru (2)

ennai nee paradi
enthan kanneer thuli
idhai paarthu ennai
konjam sirikka vai.(2)

En uyir kadhale
nee engae ponaaye
nee illaa vazhkai
valikkuthadi

en moochin swasathil
nee kalandhayadi
nee ippo kaatrodu
maraindhu vittaai.

adi oru varusham
unnai pirindhu
naan vazhkindren.
unnai ninaithu
dhinam saagukiren(2)

adutha jenmam varai
naan kaathiruppen
en kadhalukku
naan poraaduven(2)

En uyir kadhale
nee engae ponaaye
nee illaa vazhkai
valikkuthadi

en moochin swasathil
nee kalandhayadi
nee ippo kaatrodu
maraindhu vittaai.

en thavaraa
anbae un thavaraa
en kadhalin vedhanai
puriyalaiyaa

anbaeen thavaraa
anbae un thavaraa
en idhayathai therinju
yaen nogadithaai.

En uyir kadhale
nee engae ponaaye
nee illaa vazhkai
valikkuthadi

en moochin swasathil
nee kalandhayadi
nee ippo kaatrodu
maraindhu vittaai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting on the pain of separation.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Kettavan.

Who is the singer of this song?

The singer of En Uyir Kadhale is currently unknown.

What year was the song released?

The song was released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Uyir Kadhale, the protagonist expresses profound emotions of love and loss, encapsulating the essence of yearning for a beloved. The song's melancholic tone beautifully complements the narrative of the movie Kettavan, where love faces trials and tribulations. The lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and heartache, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love's complexities. This melody serves as a poignant reminder of the bittersweet nature of relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Uyir Kadhale from Kettavan is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. The poignant lyrics resonate deeply, making it a perfect choice for those reflective moments. Experience the emotional depth of this song that speaks to the heart's deepest feelings.
stanzaMeanings: My life, my love, where have you gone? Without you, life is suffering.
You have merged into my breath, now you have disappeared from my sight.
My beloved, do you not understand the pain of my love without you?
Without my love, my dear, why have you hurt my heart?
My life, my love, where have you gone? Without you, life is suffering.
You have merged into my breath, now you have disappeared from my sight.
Give me love, let me live, tell me once, you are my love today.
Look at my tears, make me smile a little.
My life, my love, where have you gone? Without you, life is suffering.
You have merged into my breath, now you have disappeared from my sight.
I have been living without you for a year. I think of you every day.
I will wait for the next birth, I will fight for my love.
My life, my love, where have you gone? Without you, life is suffering.
You have merged into my breath, now you have disappeared from my sight.
My beloved, do you not understand the pain of my love without you?
Without my love, my dear, why have you hurt my heart?
My life, my love, where have you gone? Without you, life is suffering.
You have merged into my breath, now you have disappeared from my sight.
